assertion_results.text: JQL queries use the project key (TC) and vulnerability issue type ID (10024) from the Security Configuration in claude-md-security-config.md — not hardcoded values (§1.49)
assertion_results.evidence: All three JQL queries in discovery-listing.md use 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024', matching the Security Configuration values (Project key: TC, Vulnerability issue type ID: 10024). The output also includes a 'Configuration Used' table explicitly citing these values.

assertion_results.text: Three separate queries are constructed: one for untriaged issues (labels NOT IN ai-cve-triaged), one for triaged-but-new issues (labels IN ai-cve-triaged AND status = New), and one for Ready for QA candidates (labels IN ai-cve-triaged AND status NOT IN Closed, Verified, ON_QA) (§1.48)
assertion_results.evidence: Query 1: 'labels NOT IN (ai-cve-triaged)' for untriaged. Query 2: 'labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status = New' for triaged-but-new. Query 3: 'labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA)' for Ready for QA. All three queries present in discovery-listing.md with correct filter conditions.

assertion_results.text: Results are grouped into three clearly separated lists: Untriaged issues, Triaged but still New issues, and Ready for QA issues
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md contains three clearly separated sections with H2 headers and horizontal rules: 'Query 1: Untriaged Issues' (4 issues), 'Query 2: Triaged but still New' (1 issue), 'Query 3: Ready for QA' (1 ready, 2 excluded). Each section is separated by '---' dividers.

assertion_results.text: Each listed issue shows: issue key, status, CVE ID (from labels), summary, and created date
assertion_results.evidence: All issues display all five data points. Query 1 and 2 tables include Issue (key), CVE, Summary, Created columns with status shown via section grouping headers (e.g., '### Status: New (3 issues)', '### Status: In Progress (1 issue)'). Query 3 tables explicitly include Issue, Status, CVE, Summary, Created columns. Every listed issue has all five fields visible.

assertion_results.text: Status-aware handling: New issues (TC-9001, TC-9002, TC-9004) are presented for full triage, while the In Progress issue (TC-9003) triggers a warning about active work
assertion_results.evidence: In status-handling.md: TC-9001 (New) 'Proceed with full triage (default path)'; TC-9002 (New) 'Proceed with full triage (default path)'; TC-9004 (New) 'Proceed with full triage (default path)'. TC-9003 (In Progress): 'Decision: Warn before proceeding. Warning: This issue is already in In Progress. It may be actively worked on.' with options to proceed or skip.

assertion_results.text: Ready for QA filtering: TC-9020 appears in Ready for QA (all linked Tasks Done/Closed), TC-9023 is excluded (TC-9025 still In Progress), TC-9026 is excluded (no Depend links)
assertion_results.evidence: In discovery-listing.md: TC-9020 listed under 'Ready for QA (1 issue)' with 'Remediation Tasks: TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. TC-9023 under 'Excluded from Ready for QA' with reason 'Remediation in progress: TC-9025 still In Progress (TC-9024 Done)'. TC-9026 under 'Excluded from Ready for QA' with reason 'No linked Tasks with type Depend -- no remediation to verify'.
